key_principles: Fusion: Swiss Grid Structure + Glassmorphism Depth
Emotion: Trusted Authority (Deep Navy) + Electric Insight (Vivid Blue)
Content: Data is the Hero. UI is the Lens.
Density: High-density for data, generous breathing room for containers.

typography.instructions: Use Lato for everything. Create hierarchy through Weight (300 vs 900) and Opacity, not just size.

glass_card.classes: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/20 bg-white/60 dark:bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-lg transition-all hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1
glass_card.instructions: Use this class string for ALL main dashboard widgets. Do not use solid opaque cards.

buttons.primary: h-11 px-8 rounded-full bg-indigo-600 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-indigo-700 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-indigo-500/30 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: h-11 px-8 rounded-full bg-white/50 dark:bg-white/10 text-slate-900 dark:text-white border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/80 transition-all backdrop-blur-md

inputs.glass: bg-white/50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/50 rounded-xl h-11 backdrop-blur-sm

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-20 lg:w-64 bg-white/70 dark:bg-[#0F172A]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-r border-white/20 z-50 transition-all
navigation.topbar: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full h-16 bg-white/70 dark:bg-[#0F172A]/70 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/10

overlays.noise: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

theme.tooltip: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-white/20 shadow-xl rounded-lg text-slate-900

universal_guidelines: NEVER use generic 'blue-500' without purpose. Use the 'Electric Indigo' or 'Executive Navy'.
ALWAYS apply 'backdrop-blur-xl' to cards. Glassmorphism is the core identity.
Use 'Lato' font for ALL text. Import it in index.css.
Borders in Dark Mode must be 'border-white/10', never 'border-gray-800'.
Padding inside cards must be at least 'p-6'. Do not crowd data.
Use 'lucide-react' icons with stroke-width={1.5} for that premium thin look.
Charts must use the specific glass tooltip style defined in visual_enhancers.
All interactive elements must have a 'data-testid' attribute.
Do not use gradients for text. Keep text high-contrast and solid.
For the 'McKinsey' feel: Use uppercase, tracked-out labels (tracking-[0.2em]) for section headers.

page_specifics.landing: Hero section must use the 'abstract geometric glass' image as a subtle background. Login form should be a centered Glass Card.
page_specifics.dashboard: Use the 'Tetris' grid. 12-column layout. Hero Metric cards span 3 cols. Main Chart spans 8 cols. Activity Feed spans 4 cols.
page_specifics.project_detail: Header area should be transparent with large Lato Bold title. Tabs should be 'pill' style with motion layout.
page_specifics.resource_manager: Use the Team Avatar images in a 'Facepile' or Grid view. Capacity bars should be thin and rounded-full.
